name: 13.2 fl oz Glass Bower Short Tumbler Clear - Threshold™
description: Enjoy your favorite cocktails or mocktails in style with this Glass Bower Short Tumbler from Threshold™. Made of glass, this clear short tumbler upgrades your drinkware collection. With a capacity of 13.2 fluid-ounces, this tumbler is suitable for serving any of your favorite cold beverages and can be tossed in the dishwasher after use for easy cleaning.                                                                                                         Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
